title: Pre-Commit Hook Installation
scope: v1 ships pre-commit framework only. Husky and lefthook handlers stubbed with UnsupportedFramework error so configs can declare intent.
completionNote: src/git_hooks/ module ships with config + detection + precommit handler. New `[git_hooks]` top-level block (deliberately separate from existing `[hooks]` setup-lifecycle block). `jarvy hooks {install,update,status,list,run,uninstall}` CLI subcommand wired via commands/hooks_cmd.rs and dispatch.rs. Auto-install integrated into setup_cmd between git-config and ai-hooks phases. Remote-config trust gate via `[git_hooks] allow_remote = true` (mirrors `[packages] allow_remote`). 11 new unit tests across config parsing, framework detection, yaml parsing, and flag-like-name refusal. docs/git-hooks.md ships in mkdocs nav.
